name: Bacon & Cheddar Drop Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 4 slices crisply cooked bacon, finely minced (reserve 2 tablespoons of bacon fat)
3/4 cup extra sharp Cheddar cheese, coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the onion in the reserved bacon fat over moderately low heat, stirring until it is softened; let mixture cool.
2. In a small bowl, combine the onion mixture with the finely minced bacon (process in a food processor); season with freshly ground pepper.
3. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the shortening to the dry ingredients and blend until it resembles coarse meal.
5. Stir in the bacon mixture and Cheddar cheese.
6. Gradually add the milk, stirring until the dough forms a soft, sticky consistency.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto a buttered baking sheet.
8. Bake biscuits in the middle of a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 15 to 17 minutes or until pale golden brown. Makes about 16 biscuits.
